species: Here, we study their activity in oxygen-depleted environments.
cell_type: we observed fungal mycelium in areas with very restricted O2 concentrations...
sample_source: we collected decaying spruce wood (Picea abies) in a boreal forest...
age: i.e. trees that were cut down 3, 10, and 15 years before sampling.
strain: The species identity—F. pinicola (Sw.) P. Karst.—was confirmed using molecular tools.
